drafts.subject: Friendly follow-up — Cheeky Tees invoice for $540.00
drafts.body:
Hi Deal,

Just checking in! We have an outstanding invoice of $540.00 on your account that's been open for 6 days.

We'd love to get this wrapped up so we can keep moving on your order. When you get a chance, you can:
  • Reply to this email and we'll send a payment link
  • Call us at 864-498-3475
  • Stop by the shop at 104 Trade Street, Fountain Inn, SC

Let us know if there's anything we can help with!

Best,
Cheeky Tees

drafts.subject: Important: Outstanding balance of $0.00 — Cheeky Tees
drafts.body:
Hi there,

We're following up on an outstanding invoice of $0.00 that has been open for 71 days.

We'd like to resolve this as soon as possible. Please contact us at 864-498-3475 or reply to this email to arrange payment.

We value your business and want to continue working together. Resolving this will allow us to move your order forward without any further delays.

Thank you,
Cheeky Tees
864-498-3475

drafts.subject: Action needed — Cheeky Tees invoice #l9EL8J
drafts.body:
Hi there,

We wanted to reach out regarding your outstanding balance of $0.00, which has been open for 21 days.

We want to make sure everything's good on your end. Please reach out at your earliest convenience so we can get this sorted — we'd hate for it to hold up your order.

You can:
  • Call us directly: 864-498-3475
  • Reply to this email
  • Pay online via the Square invoice link we sent earlier

We appreciate your business and want to keep things moving smoothly!

Thanks,
Cheeky Tees
hello@cheekytees.com
